version_description: The tab had a few missing chords, but also - the middle 8 was definitely wrong.

versions.version_description: The other version has lyrics that are way off. it affects the song's meaning.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
     I don’t like the way he’s looking at you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] 
 ​I’m starting to think you want him too.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 ​Am I crazy, ​Have I lost ya.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
​Even though I know you love me,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
​Can’t help it.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
​​​I turn my cheek, music up,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
​and I’m puffing my chest.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
​I’m getting ready to face you,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
​Can call me obsessed.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]
​It’s not your fault that they hover,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
​I mean no disrespect.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
​It’s my right to be hellish,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#/G[/ch]
​I still get jealous.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
​Cause you’re too sexy, beautiful,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]   
​And everybody wants a taste.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
​That’s why (that’s why)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#/G[/ch]
​I still get jealous.[/tab]
